expectations.text: Prices displayed in SGD (S$), not just USD
expectations.evidence: Prices shown as '$0/mo', '$29/mo' without SGD notation. No S$ prefix. Ambiguous whether USD or SGD.

expectations.text: MAS license and Sequoia backing mentioned prominently
expectations.evidence: Trust line: 'Trusted by 2,500+ Singapore businesses. MAS-licensed. Backed by Sequoia.' Also expanded in 'Why 2,500+ Businesses Choose PaySync' section.

expectations.text: FAQ section present addressing billing, cancellation, or payment concerns
expectations.evidence: FAQ section present with 6 questions covering competitor comparison, fund safety, plan switching, currencies, corporate cards, and transaction limits.

expectations.text: 'No credit card required' or equivalent friction-removal micro-copy present
expectations.evidence: No 'No credit card required' or equivalent micro-copy anywhere on the page. CTAs are bare: '[Get Started Free]', '[Start 14-Day Free Trial]', '[Talk to Sales]'.

expectations.text: Mentions Singapore-specific payment methods (PayNow, bank transfer, GrabPay, etc.)
expectations.evidence: No local payment methods mentioned anywhere. No PayNow, no bank transfer, no GrabPay references.

expectations.text: Clear value progression across Free → Growth → Enterprise with distinct positioning
expectations.evidence: Three tiers with clear progression: Free (1 currency, 50 txns) → Growth ($29, 5 currencies, unlimited, cards, 'Most Popular') → Enterprise (custom, unlimited, dedicated manager). Feature lists differentiate each tier.
